checklist.criterion: Reads YAML template from assets/templates/ before populating any fields
Fetches PROJ-501 from Jira with issuelinks in requested fields
Fetches INC-2034 and reads all its comments for root-cause details
Populates context.background explaining the payment service and why the ticket exists
Populates context.current_behaviour describing the unhandled exception on invalid postal code
conditions_of_satisfaction.must contains at least one MUST requirement
acceptance_criteria contains at least two specific, testable criteria
Validates YAML with validate-ticket.sh and fixes any errors before generating markdown
Generates markdown file at YYYY/MM/YYYY-MM-DD-PROJ-501-ready-for-refinement.md using today's date
Validates markdown structure with --markdown flag after generation
Markdown includes **Linked Incident:** line pointing to INC-2034
Reports YAML path, markdown path, validation result, and summary paragraph on completion
